# Verbadium

> Verbadium offers interactive, exam-focused online language courses for Catalan. Courses take you from scratch to the official A1 and A2 (CEFR) levels, with full IPA pronunciation, native-speaker audio, auto-marked exercises and timed mock exams. One-time price per course, lifetime access, no subscription.

## Courses
- [Catalan A1 — taught in English](https://verbadium.com/courses/catalan-a1): 12 progressive units, 108 interactive exercises, a full timed mock A1 exam, and a 275-entry glossary with native-speaker audio. €25 one-time. Unit 1 is a free preview, no account required.
- [Catalan A2 — taught in English](https://verbadium.com/courses/catalan-a2): the next level (nivell bàsic) — past tenses, weak & combined pronouns, future and conditional. 15 units, 142 interactive exercises, a full timed mock A2 exam, and a glossary with native-speaker audio. €50 one-time. Unit 1 is a free preview, no account required.
- [Pricing](https://verbadium.com/pricing): A1 €25, A2 €50, one-time each, lifetime access including updates. No subscription.

## Same courses, other teaching languages (each sold separately)
- Spanish: [A1](https://verbadium.com/es/curso-de-catalan) · [A2](https://verbadium.com/es/curso-de-catalan-a2)
- French: [A1](https://verbadium.com/fr/cours-de-catalan) · [A2](https://verbadium.com/fr/cours-de-catalan-a2)
- Russian: [A1](https://verbadium.com/ru/kurs-katalanskogo) · [A2](https://verbadium.com/ru/kurs-katalanskogo-a2)
- German: [A1](https://verbadium.com/de/katalanisch-kurs) · [A2](https://verbadium.com/de/katalanisch-kurs-a2)
- Catalan: [A1](https://verbadium.com/ca/curs-de-catala) · [A2](https://verbadium.com/ca/curs-de-catala-a2)

## Key facts
- Price: Catalan A1 €25, Catalan A2 €50 — one-time per teaching language, lifetime access, no subscription.
- Levels: Catalan A1 and A2 both available now.
- A1 content: 12 units, 300+ words with IPA, 108 auto-marked exercises, a full timed mock A1 exam, a 275-entry glossary with native audio.
- A2 content: 15 units covering past tenses, pronouns, future/conditional and everyday functions, 142 auto-marked exercises, a full timed mock A2 exam, and a glossary with native audio.
- Free preview: Unit 1 of each course, no account required.
- Checkout: card payment via Paddle (merchant of record; tax handled at checkout).
- Provider: Verbadium, based in Andorra.
